title: jasminum insularum
intro: Jasminum insularum is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the insular jasmine. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Jasminum insularum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Jasminum insularum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
